title: 起亚将在美国工厂使用 Atlas 机器人开发首款软件汽车
summary: Kia Corp. will begin using humanoid robots in its US factories from 2029 and is developing its first software-defined vehicle as the South Korean carmaker ramps up investment in new-generation cars and manufacturing technology to better compete with global rivals.（原题：Kia to Use Atlas Robots in US Plant, Develop First Software Car）
